subtree_descendant_count: How many people work under "{query_label}"? Do not include "{query_label}".
Count everyone below "{query_label}" in the organization chart. Do not count "{query_label}".
Using the visible reporting lines, how many people report up through "{query_label}"?
What is the total number of people under "{query_label}" in the chart?
Find everyone in "{query_label}"'s reporting group and count those people only.
manager_most_total_reports_label: Excluding the CEO at the top of the chart, which manager has the most people working under them?
Do not choose the CEO at the top. Which manager has the largest total reporting group?
Ignoring the CEO box, which manager has the most people below them in the organization chart?
Among managers below the CEO, who has the most people in their reporting chain?
Which non-CEO manager has the largest total team under them?
manager_most_direct_reports_label: Excluding the CEO at the top of the chart, which manager has the most direct reports?
Do not choose the CEO at the top. Which manager has the largest number of immediate reports?
Ignoring the CEO box, which manager has the most people reporting directly to them?
Among managers below the CEO, who has the most direct reports?
Which non-CEO manager directly manages the largest number of people?

global.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with "annotation" and "answer".
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with "answer" only.

scene:hierarchy_diagram.object_description: an organization chart with the CEO at the top, labeled employees, and visible reporting lines

query:subtree_descendant_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer count of people under the requested manager
query:subtree_descendant_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around every counted person

query:manager_most_total_reports_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected manager name
query:manager_most_total_reports_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0, y0, x1, y1] box in image pixel coordinates around the selected manager

query:manager_most_direct_reports_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected manager name
query:manager_most_direct_reports_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0, y0, x1, y1] box in image pixel coordinates around the selected manager
